case_title: LARRY MATEO VS. EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,646.00 FILED BY MATEO, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF LARRY MATEO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY OCTAVIO GOMEZ. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATEO, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EF GOMEZ CEMENT CONTRACTOR PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF AND PRESENTED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT NEGLIGENTLY DAMAGED THE NON-CODE-COMPLIANT PIPES BENEATH THE SIDEWALK. THE COURT ACCEPTS DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATION THAT IT WILL FIX THE CRACKS IN PLAINTIFF'S SIDEWALK WITHOUT CHARGE BUT PLAINTIFF MAY BRING A NEW ACTION IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT DOES NOT PERFORM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
